summary: Testing completed for Pendientes page Mutaciones tab and bug fix for dual collection insertion. All features verified: 1) /api/solicitudes-mutacion/pendientes-aprobacion endpoint returns 200 with correct structure, 2) Pendientes page shows all 5 tabs (Modificaciones, Predios Nuevos, Mutaciones, Reapariciones, Historial) for approver users, 3) Bug fix code confirmed - approved predios now insert into both 'predios' and 'predios_actualizacion' collections.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: Bug fix at line 12845-12871 in server.py - When a predio is approved via ejecutar_accion_predio_nuevo(), it now inserts into BOTH 'predios' (line 12843) AND 'predios_actualizacion' (line 12871) collections
VERIFIED: /api/solicitudes-mutacion/pendientes-aprobacion endpoint correctly filters by MutacionEstado.PENDIENTE_APROBACION and requires approve permission
VERIFIED: Pendientes.js correctly implements 5 tabs with grid-cols-5 layout and fetchMutacionesPendientes function that calls the new endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pendientes page fully tested. 5 tabs working for approver users: 1) Modificaciones - shows pending modification changes, 2) Predios Nuevos - shows new properties pending approval, 3) Mutaciones (NEW) - shows M1/M2 mutations pending approval, 4) Reapariciones - shows property reappearance requests, 5) Historial - shows historical approved/rejected changes. Bug fix for dual collection insertion confirmed in server.py ejecutar_accion_predio_nuevo function.

frontend_ui_tests.mutaciones_tab_content: PASS - Shows 'Sin mutaciones pendientes' when no pending mutations

bug_fix_verification.dual_insertion_code_exists: VERIFIED at lines 12843 and 12871 in server.py
bug_fix_verification.bugfix_comment_present: Line 12845 - BUGFIX comment explains the change

features_verified: 2. Pendientes page shows 5 tabs for approver users (Modificaciones, Predios Nuevos, Mutaciones, Reapariciones, Historial)
3. Mutaciones tab loads data from pendientes-aprobacion endpoint and shows approve/devolver/rechazar actions
4. Bug fix confirmed - approved predios now insert into both 'predios' and 'predios_actualizacion' collections
